characterProfile.hair: messy brown hair covered by a fake grey wig

scenes.line: Знаешь, сколько платили живому садовому гному в восемнадцатом веке? Триста фунтов. За полное молчание в пещере.
scenes.imagePrompt: stylized 3D animated decorative garden hermit, semi-realistic cartoon style, slightly exaggerated facial features, natural relaxed facial expression, young 18th-century peasant looking utterly surprised holding a small bag of coins inside a fake stone grotto. Soft dramatic side lighting. Muted colors, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, vertical TikTok framing, handheld camera feel, 4k render. Sharp blue mischievous eyes, pale dirt-smudged complexion, poorly attached long fake grey beard.
scenes.videoPrompt: 8-second stylized 3D animated video, vertical 9:16 TikTok format, semi-realistic cartoon style. SCENE: Peasant looking in shock at a heavy coin pouch in his dirty hands. CHARACTER: 18th-century peasant with a fake grey beard tied on a string, smudged face. SETTING: Inside a damp artificial stone cave. OPENING: close-up of his dirty hand weighing gold coins then reveal. CAMERA: slow zoom-in on surprised face. LIGHTING: soft dramatic side lighting. ATMOSPHERE: dusty air motes, cold damp stone, lonely vibe. LAST FRAME: character looks at camera with surprised expression. QUALITY: 4K cartoon render, period-accurate 18th-century props.

scenes.line: Шесть утра. Ты надеваешь фальшивую бороду из козьей шерсти. Холодно. Лорд требует идеальную философскую скорбь.
scenes.imagePrompt: stylized 3D animated decorative garden hermit, semi-realistic cartoon style, slightly exaggerated facial features, tired facial expression, peasant tying a ridiculous overly long fake goat-hair beard around his chin with a string. Warm early morning golden light illuminating the damp artificial cave entrance. Muted colors, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, vertical TikTok framing, handheld camera feel, 4k render. Sharp blue mischievous eyes, messy brown hair.

scenes.line: Главный навык — смотреть в одну точку часами. Изображаешь глубокую мысль, пока жадно мечтаешь о пинте эля.

Focused task lighting, close-up hands holding the skull. Muted colors, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, vertical TikTok framing, handheld camera feel, 4k render. scenes.line: Семь лет по контракту запрещено мыться, стричься и говорить. Под этой шерстяной мантией чешутся даже мысли.
scenes.imagePrompt: stylized 3D animated decorative garden hermit, semi-realistic cartoon style, slightly exaggerated facial features, miserable expression, violently scratching inside his heavy dirty robe while trying not to ruin the fake beard posture. Overcast flat grey lighting, tired mood. Muted colors, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, vertical TikTok framing, handheld camera feel, 4k render. Dirt-smudged skin, thin wry lips grimacing.
scenes.videoPrompt: 8-second stylized 3D animated video, vertical 9:16 TikTok format, semi-realistic cartoon style. SCENE: Secretly scratching a massive itch under his robe. CHARACTER: Itchy unwashed hermit with bugs subtly buzzing around his fake wig. SETTING: Overgrown garden path near his cave. OPENING: close-up of scratching fingers under a rough wool fabric then reveal. CAMERA: wide shot showing scale of problem. LIGHTING: overcast flat grey, tired mood. ATMOSPHERE: flies buzzing, damp heavy air, uncomfortable textures. LAST FRAME: character freezing mid-scratch as he hears footsteps. QUALITY: 4K cartoon render.

scenes.line: Однажды ночью ты сбежал в местный паб. Заказал эль. Но лорд узнал тебя по характерной пещерной грязи.
scenes.imagePrompt: stylized 3D animated decorative garden hermit, semi-realistic cartoon style, slightly exaggerated facial features, deer-in-headlights expression, sitting at a busy 18th-century pub table holding a wooden mug of ale, with fake beard askew and mud dropping on the floor. scenes.line: Гуляющие аристократы тычут в тебя тросточками. Ждут предсказаний. А ты молча прячешь жареную курицу под камнем.
scenes.imagePrompt: stylized 3D animated decorative garden hermit, semi-realistic cartoon style, slightly exaggerated facial features, stoic 'wise' expression with a hidden smirk, sitting cross-legged as an unseen aristocrat's walking cane pokes his shoulder, foot subtly hiding a cooked chicken leg behind a rock. Warm social ambient light. Muted colors, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, vertical TikTok framing, handheld camera feel, 4k render.

scenes.line: Вечер. Гости ушли. Ты отклеиваешь зудящую бороду в сырой искусственной руине. Завтра снова изображать святого.

scenes.line: Богачи покупали живых людей для декора своих красивых лужаек. А ты продавал им иллюзию за еду.
scenes.imagePrompt: stylized 3D animated decorative garden hermit, semi-realistic cartoon style, slightly exaggerated facial features, gentle knowing smile, looking directly at the viewer, tossing a silver coin in the air inside his fake dark grotto. Golden hour warm, reflective lighting sweeping through the cave entrance. Muted colors, cinematic composition, shallow depth of field, vertical TikTok framing, handheld camera feel, 4k render.
